title: synotis simonsii
intro: Synotis simonsii, also known as the Bokeloh synotis, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Synotis simonsii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. It is often prepared as a herbal tea or in the form of a decoction, and its extracts are used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
